rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope when binding outputs to inputs via implementation-level ports or subcomponent connections.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component boundaries by placing implementation-specific contracts only within implementation annexes.
Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible features or explicitly declared constants, not internal subcomponent paths.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use AGREE boolean expressions with logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for conditional output derivation.
Declare scalar types as int, real, or bool; avoid AADL property names as AGREE variables.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type annexes; use component-level outputs instead.
Do not embed AADL property names (e.g., Period, Deadline) as variables in AGREE annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE annex placement strategy for type vs implementation
